text: As I chant the sound "Om," I feel a quiet resonance echoing within and around me. The hum of this sacred syllable seems out of place amid the sterile glass walls and technological displays, yet it creates a subtle thread of unity. In this space, filled with both aged wisdom and modern research, I sense the paradox of connection—between inner presence and the pursuit of knowledge. I feel contemplative, suspended between the meditative and the rational.
